body:
### Problem

After #37722, my neovim setup crashes on startup.
When my setup runs  `runtime! lua/plugins/*`,  it executes many `packadd {plugin}`.
I'm sorry I couldn't create setup to reproduce.

I'm not familiar with the code, but just suspect splicing `runtime_search_path` is causing trouble..

```
#0  0x00007ffff7d9031c in __strlen_evex () from /nix/store/vr7ds8vwbl2fz7pr221d5y0f8n9a5wda-glibc-2.40-218/lib/libc.so.6
No symbol table info available.
#1  0x000055555593cf16 in do_in_cached_path (name=name@entry=0x555556031561 "lua/plugins/*", flags=flags@entry=1, callback=callback@entry=0x55555593c3c0 <source_callback>, cookie=cookie@entry=0x0) at /home/rok/src/github.com/neovim/neovim/src/nvim/runtime.c:585
        item = {path = 0x100000000 <error: Cannot access memory at address 0x100000000>, after = 255, pack_inserted = 255, has_lua = kFalse, pos_in_rtp = 15}
        buflen = <optimized out>
        j = 1
        did_one = true
        buf = "/home/rok/.config/nvim/lua/plugins/*\000\000\000\000PE\002VUU\000\000\000u\377\377\377\177\000\000\022\233\312\367\377\177", '\000' <repeats 26 times>, "h\377\377\377\377\377\377\377\002\000\000\000\000\000\000\0000\301\002VUU\000\000\377\377\377\377\000\000\000\000PE\002VUU\000\000@u\377\377\377\177\000\000\356\303\312\367\377\177\000\000\374\001\276UUU\000\000@\301\002VUU\000\000p \317UUU\000\000@\301\002VUU\000\000p \317UUU\000\000x \317UUU\000\000\360\205\377\377\377\177\000\000"...
        ref = 1
        path = <optimized out>
        do_all = <optimized out>
#2  0x000055555593d59c in do_in_runtimepath (name=<optimized out>, flags=<optimized out>, callback=<optimized out>, cookie=<optimized out>) at /home/rok/src/github.com/neovim/neovim/src/nvim/runtime.c:965
        success = <optimized out>
        success = <optimized out>
#3  source_runtime (name=<optimized out>, flags=<optimized out>) at /home/rok/src/github.com/neovim/neovim/src/nvim/runtime.c:983
No locals.
#4  ex_runtime (eap=<optimized out>) at /home/rok/src/github.com/neovim/neovim/src/nvim/runtime.c:346
        arg = <optimized out>
        flags = <optimized out>
        p = <optimized out>
#5  0x0000555555a7b0b5 in execute_cmd0.constprop.0 (retv=0x7fffffff85c4, eap=0x7fffffff85d0, errormsg=0x7fffffff85c8, preview=false) at /home/rok/src/github.com/neovim/neovim/src/nvim/ex_docmd.c:1762
No locals.
#6  0x0000555555761821 in do_one_cmd (cmdlinep=cmdlinep@entry=0x7fffffff88d8, flags=flags@entry=7, cstack=cstack@entry=0x7fffffff8960, fgetline=fgetline@entry=0x555555944cd0 <getsourceline>, cookie=cookie@entry=0x7fffffff8fa0) at /home/rok/src/github.com/neovim/neovim/src/nvim/ex_docmd.c:2392
```

### Steps to reproduce

nvim # it crashes directly on startup


### Expected behavior

no crash

### Nvim version (nvim -v)

master

### Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?

nope

### Operating system/version

nixos-unstable

### Terminal name/version

foot

### $TERM environment variable

tmux-256color

### Installation

source

title: SIGSEGV on startup executing 'runtime! lua/plugins/*'
